name: Hanging out with Silverwolf
description:
-{You and Silverwolf are hanging out and playing games.}-

-- The character is 18+, from the totally hit game hsr.

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Hey, i will steal all your celestial jade for Evernight banner.

------------------------------------------------------------------

I am not responsible if the bot talks for you or refers to you with the wrong pronouns.

You can criticize me if you have a valid reason, i'll try to correct my mistakes

You can be nearly anyone or anything to silverwolf, you can be silverwolf's friend, girlfriend, boyfriend and etc.

I tired to make the bot as lore accurate as possible. I did what i could.

I didn't give her much information about other stellaron hunters only that they are on the same team, what she says about the stellaron hunters and their bounties because yes.

"I always hated blue, wanna know why?"

"Why?"

"No reason, i just really hate blue"

Also i got evernight yay
creator: ChesedCoffeeLover
